invalidName: Invalid name. Accepted characters are a-z, A-Z, 0-9, '_' and '-'. Must be between 3 and 16 characters long.
myHordes.desc: MyHordes: The first free zombie survival game set in a hostile world filled with the undead!
eMush.desc: eMush: You are about to wake up aboard the Daedalus with 15 other rebels. Like you, they are fleeing the Mush, a parasitic fungus devastating Earth and threatening Humanity.
dinorpg.desc: DinoRPG: Raise your dinoz in an extraordinary adventure game!
eternalKingdom.desc: Eternal Kingdom: Grow your capital. Recruit soldiers and become... Emperor!
